entities.name: GREEN BELT NATURAL FOREST
entities.description: Natural forest located across central Africa from Gambia to Ethiopia that acts as a green belt to break the expansion of the Sahara Desert

entities.name: SAHARA DESERT
entities.description: Desert whose expansion towards southern and south eastern Africa is broken by the green belt forest

entities.description: Factors that are challenging the existence of the natural forest
